config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that easily becomes an excuse to ignore basic rights and abuse power. In my view, a healthy society protects individual dignity first, then asks people to contribute to the common good within fair limits. From my perspective, collective interests matter, but they should never be used to silence minorities or justify unfair treatment.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kita sendiri menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kebaikan bersama” diberi prioritas tanpa batas, itu sering dipakai untuk menekan minoritas, membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, dan mengorbankan kebebasan dasar. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya sah kalau dibatasi oleh hak-hak yang tidak boleh dilanggar, seperti kebebasan berbicara, due process, dan perlakuan yang setara. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat bukan yang menuntut individu tunduk dulu, melainkan yang memaksa kepentingan kolektif membuktikan bahwa ia tidak merusak martabat manusia.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “for the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or obedience. The community matters, and gotong royong is important, but it should not erase basic rights or let authorities decide that some people are expendable. A healthy society is one where individual dignity is protected first, then collective goals are pursued within clear limits. If society is allowed to override rights too easily, the result is often not harmony but abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika alasan “demi publik” dipakai untuk meluaskan kekuasaan negara dan menekan orang yang tidak populer. Poin tentang gotong royong dan tujuan bersama memang masuk akal, tetapi menurut saya itu hanya sah kalau hak dasar tetap jadi batas keras, bukan sesuatu yang bisa dinegosiasikan setiap kali mayoritas merasa terganggu. Masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah memaksa warganya patuh, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi kebebasan, proses hukum, dan martabat setiap orang. Kalau hak individu bisa dikorbankan terlalu gampang, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat sering kali cuma kedok untuk kepentingan pihak yang paling berkuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over the individual in any automatic way. From my Indonesian perspective, values like gotong royong matter, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence, obedience, or unfair treatment. Collective goals are legitimate, but only if basic rights stay as hard limits, not things the majority or authorities can override whenever it is convenient. A society is stronger when it protects individual dignity first and then builds cooperation on that foundation.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat terlalu sering alasan “demi publik” dipakai untuk memperluas kekuasaan negara, membungkam orang yang tidak populer, dan mengorbankan hak dasar dengan dalih yang terdengar mulia. Memang benar masyarakat butuh tujuan bersama, tetapi tujuan itu hanya sah kalau berjalan di bawah batas yang jelas: kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan perlakuan setara tidak boleh menjadi korban. Menurut saya, kalau hak individu bisa dikorbankan terlalu mudah, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat biasanya hanya nama lain untuk kuasa mayoritas atau elite.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
